statement.latex: We associate with words in the alphabet$x$,$x^{-1}$,$y$,$y^{-1}$,$z$,$z^{-1},$operations which are understood as functions in variables$x, y, z,$. We say that a word$A$is expressible in words$B_1, ,B_n$on the group$G$\/ if$A$can be constructed from the words$B_1, ,B_n$and variables by means of finitely many substitutions of words one into another and replacements of a word by another word which is...
